chunks.text: EECS Faculty and Staff Directory. Please add .berkeley.edu to all email addresses. ERSO/CSS Team 2 affiliates are no longer included on this directory. You can find them using the ERSO People Finder. This directory contains faculty and staff listings with columns for Name, Office, Phone, E-Mail, Status, Affil., and Sponsor.
chunks.question: What should be added to email addresses in the directory?
